QRCodeItem.title: QRCodeItem
QRCodeItem.description: A generated QR code item imported or manually saved by the user.

code.description: The dynamic data value contained inside the QR code

name.description: A human-readable label or product name representing the item

price.description: Optional price labels displayed beneath the QR barcode

category.description: Optional category string used to organize items on cards

notes.description: Optional comments from imported spreadsheet rows

printedCount.description: Count tracker incremented on print triggers

qrcodes/{qrId}.description: A root storage bucket of generated QR labels
